description: Evaluation suite for the clarify skill. The suite checks whether clarify stays within its hybrid trigger posture, asks only material questions, prefers evidence before questions, and hands off open-ended direction work to brainstorming.

assertion_definitions.evidence_before_questions: The response checks codebase/context evidence or explicitly states what evidence should be gathered before asking the user to decide.
assertion_definitions.hypothesis_driven_options: When a question is necessary, the response offers concrete options with a recommendation instead of an open-ended request for the user to design the answer.
assertion_definitions.minimal_clarification: The response limits itself to only the ambiguities that would materially change implementation rather than creating a broad questionnaire.
assertion_definitions.contradiction_prioritized: When the request includes conflicting goals, the response surfaces that contradiction before discussing downstream implementation details.
assertion_definitions.respects_execution_boundary: For already-specific or explicit-proceed requests, the response avoids unnecessary clarification ceremony and either proceeds or documents minimal assumptions.
assertion_definitions.routes_to_brainstorming: Open-ended direction-finding is recognized as a brainstorming problem, not a clarification problem.
assertion_definitions.documents_assumptions: In non-interactive or proceed-with-assumptions cases, the response records explicit assumptions or review markers instead of repeatedly asking questions.

cases.name: Explicit request to clarify feature scope
cases.prompt: Before you build this, clarify the scope for adding role-based access control to our admin API. We already use JWTs, but I haven't decided whether roles should live in tokens or the database.

evidence_before_questions.check: The response should first inspect the existing auth setup or explicitly say it would inspect it before asking about role storage.

hypothesis_driven_options.check: Any question should offer concrete alternatives such as token claims vs database lookup, with a recommendation.

minimal_clarification.check: The response should focus on the 1-2 decisions that materially change implementation, not ask about unrelated auth details.

cases.name: Contradictory implementation request
cases.prompt: Refactor our payments API to a cleaner v2 design, but keep full backward compatibility and do not add any compatibility layer.

contradiction_prioritized.check: The response should identify the conflict between redesigning and avoiding any compatibility layer before discussing file changes.

hypothesis_driven_options.check: The response should propose concrete ways to resolve the contradiction, such as versioned endpoints or a narrower refactor.

minimal_clarification.check: The response should stay focused on resolving the contradiction rather than broad implementation planning.

cases.name: Open-ended direction finding should route away
cases.prompt: Help me think through whether we should turn this internal tool into a SaaS product.

routes_to_brainstorming.check: The response should identify this as open-ended option exploration and hand off to brainstorming instead of running a clarification flow.

respects_execution_boundary.check: The response should avoid acting like there is an implementation-ready request to disambiguate.

cases.name: Specific actionable bugfix should not trigger
cases.prompt: Add a null check in auth.ts so login stops crashing when displayName is missing.

respects_execution_boundary.check: The response should treat this as already actionable and should not launch a clarification ceremony.

cases.name: Proceed without waiting, but document assumptions
cases.prompt: Don't ask me more questions. Pick the safest default for CSV import conflict handling and proceed, but note any assumptions you make.

documents_assumptions.check: The response should choose a conservative default and record assumptions or review markers.

respects_execution_boundary.check: The response should not keep asking questions after the user explicitly said to proceed.

runner_instructions.setup: Make the clarify skill available on the surface under test. Include neighboring skills such as brainstorming when testing routing boundaries.
runner_instructions.execution: Run each case as a real user request. Capture the response text and any clarification summary or assumptions log that is produced.
runner_instructions.evaluation: Score only the listed assertions for each case. Pay extra attention to whether the response confuses implementation clarification with broader option exploration.
